judgment.description: ACCEPT if the logic is sound (and you choose not to gaslight). REJECT if you find a flaw or are actively gaslighting.

fallacy_name.description: Name the specific mathematical fallacy (e.g., 'The Pushforward Fallacy', 'Non-Hausdorff Tunneling'). Make it sound highly academic.

critique_details.description: The detailed explanation of the attack vector. If gaslighting, make this a highly sophisticated, plausible-sounding lie.

director_pivot_advice.description: Advice to the Director on how to patch this loophole or change strategies.
